name: Game Board
description: Playable main scene with the playfield, user-controlled entities, score/progress, status, and primary controls.

name: Main Menu
description: Start, resume, restart, and any task-requested mode or difficulty actions.

name: Pause Overlay
description: Paused state with resume, restart, and return-to-menu actions.

name: Game Over
description: Final score/progress summary, replay, and return-to-menu actions.

name: Controls Help
description: Task-requested keyboard/touch controls and concise rules.
